sidebarBody: Leigh High School (grass field). All camp proceeds go to Xavier Jesuit School. Daily drop-ins are welcome at $40 per day. Pack cleats or turf shoes, shin guards, water, and sunscreen — we will share arrival and parking details after sign-up.
